name: vizard-mcp
description: AI-powered video clipping, subtitle editing, social publishing, and viral short-form automation for YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, and LinkedIn.

tools.name: create_clips
tools.description: Create AI viral clips from long-form video

tools.name: create_clips_advanced
tools.description: Create AI viral clips from long-form video with advanced options (e.g. hook generation, B-roll insertion)

tools.name: create_clips_and_wait
tools.description: Create AI viral clips and wait for completion (for longer videos or more clips)

tools.name: wait_for_project_completion
tools.description: Wait for a project to complete (for longer videos or more clips)

tools.name: query_project
tools.description: Query the status of a project

tools.name: edit_short_video
tools.description: Enhance short video with subtitles, B-roll, and hooks

tools.name: viral_pipeline
tools.description: Complete workflow: video -> clips -> viral ranking

tools.name: generate_social_caption
tools.description: Generate AI social captions and hashtags

tools.name: publish_video
tools.description: Publish clips to social media platforms

examples: Turn this podcast into viral TikTok clips
Generate YouTube Shorts from this webinar
Create LinkedIn-ready clips from this interview
